Fallback/manual scoring trigger if OnCollisionEnter with Gems did not occur (e.g., due to physics timing or pathing). Board has BoxCollider id=1566218464 (non-trigger) and MonoBehaviour id=1566218463 mapped to script GUID 7e860543c4b7344fba986977af52cbaf (PlatformMovement). This manual trigger invokes the same public no-arg method PlatformMovement.getFiftyPoints() that is normally called in OnCollisionEnter when colliding with objects tagged 'Gems'. Expected behavior: increments total by 10, enables gemsChildUI; when total reaches 50, enables congratulationsUI.
